BETWEEN 11 AND 1115 PM CDT A WET DOWNBURST CAUSED DAMAGE TO ONE BUSINESS...DESTOYED A SMALL GREENHOUSE AND ROLLED OVER A SEMI TRUCK TRAILER. TWO PICKUP TRUCKS ALSO SUSTAINED DAMAGE. THE BUSINESS HAD TWO WINDOWS BROKEN AND ONE SIDE DOOR DAMAGED...THEN TWO TALL GARAGE DOORS SEVERELY DAMAGED. RADAR AND LOCAL REPORTS SHOWED RAINFALL FROM 1.40 TO 2.01 INCHES AS THE THUNDERSTORM MOVED NORTH ACROSS TOWN.
